countSelected.instruction: confirmation text to reset count number of users passwords

countSelected_plural.instruction: confirmation text to reset count number of users passwords
countSelected_plural.text: {{count}} users will be prompted to reset their passwords in 7 days.

errorText.instruction: text to show as error, meaning the operation won't happen on all users but just some of them
errorText.text: {{lockedUsersCount}} of the {{totalUsersCount}} users selected are locked and won't be able to log in unless unlocked first. Would you like to reset $t(common.dynamic.passwordLowercase, {"count": {{unlockedUsersCount}} }) for the remaining $t(common.userWithCount, {"count": {{unlockedUsersCount}} }).
